class.name: SystemIdentifier
class.comment: FastDIS local patch: normalize the incomplete DIS 7 SystemIdentifier record to the same 6-byte wire layout used by DIS6 SystemID so the restored IFF PDU row can be parsed consistently. Evidence: references/open-dis/DIS7.xml marks the checked-in record as NOT COMPLETE and leaves ChangeOptions unresolved, while references/open-dis/DIS6.xml defines the interoperable on-wire layout as systemType u16, systemName u16, systemMode u8, changeOptions u8.

attribute.name: systemType
attribute.comment: general type of emitting system, an enumeration

attribute.name: systemName
attribute.comment: named type of system, an enumeration

attribute.name: systemMode
attribute.comment: mode of operation for the system, an enumeration

attribute.name: changeOptions
attribute.comment: status of this PDU, see section 6.2.15
